mapper.select: /* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getPrStdCtgListWithHierarchy */ SELECT PSC.STD_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_CTG_NM, PSC.LEAF_CTG_YN, PSC.USE_YN, PSC.SORT_SEQ, PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_LRG_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_MID_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_SML_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_THN_CTG_NO, PSC.MD_ID, SUB.USER_NM AS MD_NM, PSC.SAFE_CERTI_NEED_YN, PSC.GOODS_NOTI_LISART_CD, ( SELECT PSC_LRG.STD_CTG_NM || COALESCE('>' || PSC_MID.STD_CTG_NM, '') || COALESCE('>' || PSC_SML.STD_CTG_NM, '') || COALESCE('>' || PSC_THN.STD_CTG_NM, '') FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC_TEMP LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_STD_CTG PSC_LRG ON PSC_TEMP.STD_LRG_CTG_NO = PSC_LRG.STD_CTG_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_STD_CTG PSC_MID ON PSC_TEMP.STD_MID_CTG_NO = PSC_MID.STD_CTG_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_STD_CTG PSC_SML ON PSC_TEMP.STD_SML_CTG_NO = PSC_SML.STD_CTG_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_STD_CTG PSC_THN ON PSC_TEMP.STD_THN_CTG_NO = PSC_THN.STD_CTG_NO WHERE PSC.STD_CTG_NO = PSC_TEMP.STD_CTG_NO ) AS HIERARCHY_TEXT, PSC.MRGN_RATE FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC LEFT OUTER JOIN ST_USER_BASE SUB ON PSC.MD_ID = SUB.USER_ID ORDER BY PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO, PSC.SORT_SEQ, PSC.SYS_MOD_DTM DESC

/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryInfo */
SELECT PSC.STD_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_CTG_NM, PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO, UPPER_PSC.STD_CTG_NM AS UPR_STD_CTG_NM, PSC.USE_YN, PSC.SORT_SEQ, PSC.LEAF_CTG_YN, PSC.SAFE_CERTI_NEED_YN, PSC.MD_ID, PSC.HS_CD, SUB.USER_NM AS MD_NM, PSC.GOODS_NOTI_LISART_CD, FN_GET_CODENAME ('PR012', PSC.GOODS_NOTI_LISART_CD) AS GOODS_NOTI_LISART_CD_NM, CASE WHEN PSC.STD_CTG_NO IN ( SELECT PSC1.UPR_STD_CTG_NO FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC1 ) THEN 'N' WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI WHERE PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N' ) > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_GOODS_BASE PGB WHERE PGB.STD_CTG_NO = PSC.STD_CTG_NO AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD IN ('10', '20') ) > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN COALESCE(PSC.STD_THN_CTG_NO, '') != '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END LEAF_CTG_YN_CHANGE_POSSIBLE, PSC.MRGN_RATE -- , PSC.SAM_MARKET_YN, PSC.SYS_MOD_ID, PSC.SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC LEFT OUTER JOIN ST_USER_BASE SUB ON (PSC.MD_ID = SUB.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN PR_STD_CTG UPPER_PSC ON (PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO = UPPER_PSC.STD_CTG_NO) WHERE PSC.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo}
/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryMgmtChildListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC WHERE PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo}

/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryMgmtChildList */ SELECT PSC.STD_CTG_NO, PSC.STD_CTG_NM, PSC.USE_YN, PSC.SORT_SEQ, PSC.LEAF_CTG_YN, PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO, PSC.SYS_MOD_ID, PSC.SYS_MOD_DTM, CASE WHEN PSC.STD_CTG_NO IN ( SELECT PSC1.UPR_STD_CTG_NO FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC1 ) THEN 'N' WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI WHERE PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO = PSC.STD_CTG_NO AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N' ) > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_GOODS_BASE PGB WHERE PGB.STD_CTG_NO = PSC.STD_CTG_NO AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD IN ('10', '20') ) > 0 THEN 'N' WHEN COALESCE(PSC.STD_THN_CTG_NO, '') != '' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END LEAF_CTG_YN_CHANGE_POSSIBLE FROM PR_STD_CTG PSC WHERE PSC.UPR_STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} ORDER BY PSC.SORT_SEQ, PSC.SYS_MOD_DTM DESC LIMIT #{rowsPerPage} OFFSET (#{pageIdx} - 1) * #{rowsPerPage}
/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryMgmtGoodsListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_GOODS_BASE PGB WHERE PGB.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD IN ('10', '20')

/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryMgmtGoodsList */ SELECT PGB.GOODS_NO, PGBM.GOODS_NM, FN_GET_CODENAME ('PR005', PGB.SALE_STAT_CD) AS SALE_STAT_CD_NM FROM PR_GOODS_BASE PGB INNER JOIN PR_GOODS_BASE_ML PGBM ON PGB.GOODS_NO = PGBM.GOODS_NO AND PGBM.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE PGB.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD IN ('10', '20') ORDER BY PGB.GOODS_NO DESC LIMIT #{rowsPerPage} OFFSET (#{pageIdx} - 1) * #{rowsPerPage}

/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryGoodsAttrList */ SELECT PSCGAI.STD_CTG_NO, PSCGAI.ATT_CD, PACIM.ATT_NM, PACI.ATT_VAL_TYP_CD, FN_GET_CODENAME ('PR043', PACI.ATT_VAL_TYP_CD) AS ATT_VAL_TYP_NM, PSCGAI.DISP_SEQ, PSCGAI.USE_YN, PACI.ATT_CD_EXP_YN, PSCGAI.SYS_MOD_ID, PSCGAI.SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_STD_CTG_GOODS_ATT_INFO PSCGAI INNER JOIN PR_ATT_CD_INFO PACI ON PSCGAI.ATT_CD = PACI.ATT_CD INNER JOIN PR_ATT_CD_INFO_ML PACIM ON PACIM.ATT_CD = PSCGAI.ATT_CD AND PACIM.LANG_CD = #{langCd} WHERE PSCGAI.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} ORDER BY PSCGAI.DISP_SEQ, PSCGAI.SYS_MOD_DTM DESC
/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getStandardCategoryDisplayListCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI WHERE PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* StandardCategoryQueryMyBatisDao.getAttInfoList */ SELECT PACI.ATT_CD, PACIM.ATT_NM, PACI.ATT_VAL_TYP_CD, PACI.ATT_CD_EXP_YN, FN_GET_CODENAME ('PR043', PACI.ATT_VAL_TYP_CD) AS ATT_VAL_TYP_NM FROM PR_ATT_CD_INFO PACI INNER JOIN PR_ATT_CD_INFO_ML PACIM ON PACIM.ATT_CD = PACI.ATT_CD AND PACIM.LANG_CD = #{langCd} ORDER BY PACI.ATT_CD

SELECT A.std_ctg_no, A.goods_noti_lisart_cd, B.goods_noti_item_cd, C.noti_item_nm, B.sort_seq FROM pr_std_ctg A JOIN pr_goods_noti_lisart_item_info B ON A.goods_noti_lisart_cd = B.goods_noti_lisart_cd JOIN pr_goods_noti_item_cd_ml C ON B.goods_noti_item_cd = C.goods_noti_item_cd WHERE A.std_ctg_no = #{stdCtgNo} AND C.lang_cd = #{langCd} ORDER BY B.sort_seq

SELECT B.grp_cd_nm, A.grp_cd, A.cd, A.cd_nm, A.cd_desc, A.use_yn, A.sort_seq, A.ref_1_val, A.ref_2_val, A.ref_3_val, A.ref_4_val, A.ref_5_val, A.ref_6_val, A.ref_7_val, A.sys_reg_id, A.sys_reg_dtm, A.sys_mod_id, A.sys_mod_dtm FROM st_std_cd A LEFT OUTER JOIN st_grp_cd B ON A.grp_cd = B.grp_cd ORDER BY A.grp_cd, A.sort_seq

SELECT B.optn_cat_nm, /* 옵션분류명 */ A.optn_cat_no, /* 옵션분류번호 */ D.optn_nm, /* 옵션명 */ C.optn_no, /* 옵션번호 */ C.use_yn, /* 사용여부 */ C.sort_seq /* 정렬순서 */ FROM pr_optn_clss_cd A INNER JOIN pr_optn_clss_cd_ml B ON A.optn_cat_no = B.optn_cat_no AND B.lang_cd = 'ko' INNER JOIN pr_optn_cd C ON A.optn_cat_no = C.optn_cat_no INNER JOIN pr_optn_cd_ml D ON C.optn_cat_no = D.optn_cat_no AND C.optn_no = D.optn_no AND D.lang_cd = 'ko' ORDER BY A.sort_seq, A.optn_cat_no, C.sort_seq, D.optn_nm
